title: Review: Mutants and Mystics by Jeffrey J. Kripal (Journal of Religion)
author: William Elison
card_summary: A scholarly book review from The Journal of Religion evaluating Jeffrey J. Kripal's Mutants and Mystics, which examines the connections between science fiction, superhero comics, and paranormal experience. The review assesses Kripal's argument that popular culture genres serve as vehicles for genuine mystical and paranormal encounters.
